title: Baroniella linearis
taxonomy: Baroniella linearis belongs to the family Burmanniaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the burmanni or skeleton plant family. This family consists of approximately 104 species, including Baroniella linearis, which is a genus of flowering plants. The classification of Baroniella linearis also places it within the order Dioscoreales, a group of flowering plants that are often referred to as the yam order. The Burmanniaceae family and Dioscoreales order are both part of the larger monocot clade. This classification helps to organize and understand the evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
